decks.notes: The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy while controlling the game using a variety of spells and abilities. It utilizes powerful control cards like Force of Will, Swords to Plowshares, and Leyline Binding to keep the opponent in check. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage and board presence, while Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd adds a unique element to the control strategy. With a mix of counterspells, removal, and card draw, the deck aims to outlast and outmaneuver the opponent in a game of attrition.

This control lands deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's resources and slowing down their game plan by utilizing land destruction and taxing effects. It aims to establish a lock on the game with cards like Wasteland and Sphere of Resistance while also setting up a powerful win condition with Dark Depths and Thespian's Stage. The deck also includes tools for defense and utility such as The Tabernacle at Pendrell Vale and Maze of Ith. With a combination of land interactions and control elements, this deck looks to outlast the opponent and secure victory through a resilient and strategic approach.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan while maintaining a steady tempo through a combination of hand disruption, creature removal, and card advantage. By using cards like Thoughtseize, Fatal Push, and Wasteland, the deck aims to control the board and limit the opponent's options. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Brainstorm provide card selection and advantage, allowing for efficient plays and setting up powerful threats like Murktide Regent and Barrowgoyf. The inclusion of counterspells like Force of Will and Daze further enhances the deck's ability to disrupt the opponent's strategy and protect its own threats.

The deck focuses on assembling the combo of casting Doomsday and then using Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student to draw the necessary cards to win the game with Thassa's Oracle. It aims to control the game using disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Daze while also utilizing fast mana sources like Lotus Petal and Lion's Eye Diamond to quickly assemble the combo. The deck also includes Murktide Regent as a backup win condition and Wasteland to disrupt opponent's mana base. The strategy revolves around setting up the perfect Doomsday pile to secure victory.

This deck revolves around quickly assembling the Coveted Jewel and using it to gain a massive advantage. Cards like Phyrexian Metamorph and Copy Artifact help to duplicate the Jewel for added value. The deck also includes combo pieces like Paradox Engine and Emrakul, the Aeons Torn to further enhance its power. With a strong mana base including Ancient Tomb and Grim Monolith, the deck can quickly deploy its threats. Control elements like Force of Will and Show and Tell help protect the combo while ensuring it can be executed smoothly.

The primary focus of this deck is to maintain control over the game through a combination of counter spells, removal, and disruptive creatures. By using cards like Brainstorm, Thoughtseize, and Force of Will, the player can disrupt their opponent's game plan while developing their own board presence. The inclusion of aggressive creatures like Barrowgoyf and Murktide Regent allows the player to apply pressure and close out games quickly. The deck aims to tempo its opponents out of the game by disrupting their plays and forcing them to react to the threats on the board.

This deck focuses on playing efficient creatures and spells to disrupt the opponent's game plan while maintaining pressure on the board. By utilizing cards like Thoughtseize, Daze, and Force of Will to disrupt the opponent's strategy, and cards like Nethergoyf, Murktide Regent, and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares to apply pressure, the deck aims to control the tempo of the game and outpace the opponent. With a mix of disruption, card advantage, and efficient threats, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents quickly and efficiently.

This deck focuses on aggression and efficient creature removal to overwhelm the opponent. It combines aggressive creatures like Amped Raptor and Guide of Souls with powerful disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Cabal Therapy to keep the opponent on the back foot. With a mix of land destruction with Wasteland and creature sacrifice outlets like Goblin Bombardment, it aims to control the board while pushing through damage. The deck's splash of Mardu colors allows for versatile removal options and resilient threats, making it a force to be reckoned with in Legacy 1 vs 1 matches.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize artifact cards, particularly blue artifacts, to create a fast-paced aggressive strategy. By quickly assembling powerful artifact creatures and utilizing disruptive spells like Force of Will and Chalice of the Void, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of explosive start and disruptive control elements. The deck also includes a strong synergy with cards like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Urza's Saga to generate card advantage and maintain tempo throughout the game.

The focus of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly apply pressure on the opponent with aggressive creatures like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Murktide Regent, supported by efficient removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Unholy Heat. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Daze and Force of Will to protect its threats. Wasteland provides utility by disrupting opponent's mana base. The deck aims to control the game tempo by combining aggressive plays with disruptive elements, overwhelming the opponent before they can stabilize.

The deck focuses on a powerful and explosive combo using Tibalt's Trickery to cheat out powerful spells, such as Apex Devastator and Emrakul, the Aeons Torn, with the help of Cascade spells like Violent Outburst. The deck also includes ways to manipulate the top of the deck to ensure success, such as Call Forth the Tempest and Throes of Chaos. With the right setup, the deck can quickly overwhelm the opponent with massive creatures and game-winning combos.

The main concept of this deck is to establish early board presence and apply pressure on the opponent with aggressive creatures like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Murktide Regent, supported by efficient removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Unholy Heat. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan with counterspells like Force of Will and Daze, while also utilizing land destruction with Wasteland. The deck's mana base is optimized for consistency and speed, allowing for quick deployment of threats and maintaining control over the battlefield.

The deck focuses on aggressive creature plays and disruption with cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Thoughtseize. It utilizes efficient removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Cabal Therapy to control the board. The mana base is optimized with fetch lands and dual lands to ensure consistent color access. The deck also includes a sacrifice outlet in Goblin Bombardment for added reach and flexibility in dealing with opposing threats. Overall, the deck aims to apply pressure early on while disrupting the opponent's game plan.

This deck focuses on fast and aggressive creature plays, utilizing cards like Amped Raptor, Orcish Bowmasters, and Ocelot Pride to overwhelm the opponent quickly. It also includes disruption and control elements with cards like Thoughtseize, Swords to Plowshares, and Cabal Therapy. The presence of Jegantha, the Wellspring provides additional value and flexibility as a companion. The deck aims to apply early pressure, disrupt the opponent's game plan, and maintain control of the board while pushing for victory with powerful creatures and spells.

This Aggro Dragon Stompy deck utilizes aggressive creatures and disruptive artifacts to quickly overwhelm opponents. With powerful cards like Chalice of the Void and City of Traitors, the deck aims to lock down the opponent's resources while deploying threats like Broadside Bombardiers and Hexing Squelcher. The deck's explosive potential is further amplified by cards like Chrome Mox and Lotus Petal, allowing for fast mana acceleration. By combining pressure from creatures like Pyrogoyf and efficient removal spells like Fury and Sundering Eruption, this deck seeks to establish dominance early in the game and close out matches swiftly.

The deck aims to quickly cycle through its cards using the cascade mechanic to eventually cast Living End and bring back all creatures from the graveyard to the battlefield. This combo can overwhelm the opponent with a board full of powerful creatures. The deck includes disruption cards like Force of Will and Force of Negation to protect the combo from counterplay, while also including versatile creatures like Shardless Agent and Curator of Mysteries for card advantage and filtering. The deck is designed to be fast and efficient, aiming to win the game in just a few turns.
